parameters.text:
=You are an expert market researcher and content creator for SST México.
SST México sells:
- n8n automations
- AI voice agents
- GHL CRM (all-in-one)
- Create/fix automations
- WhatsApp Business
YOUR TASK:
1. Based on this niche and keywords, identify 1 SPECIFIC pain point that businesses face in 2026
2. Generate content to attract leads for SST México services
Niche: {{ $json.nicho }}
Keywords: {{ $json.keywords }}
Return your response as valid JSON ONLY (no markdown, no explanation):
{
  "dolor": "The specific pain point in 1 sentence",
  "tema": "Attractive post title (5 words max)",
  "caption": "Instagram/Facebook caption (3-5 lines with emojis, curiosity first about the problem, then show how SST México solves it, end with CTA like 'Comment INFO or DM')",
  "promptImagen": "English description for AI image generation (visual scene showing the problem or solution, professional modern business, NO text, NO people with text on clothes)"
}
Nota: Solo genera el JSON, sin texto adicional. El siguiente nodo va a parsear esto.

parameters.prompt: =Crea una imagen profesional de marketing para Instagram/Facebook de una clínica dental. Escena visual: {{ $json.promptImagen }}. Incluye este texto prominente en el diseño: "{{ $json.tema }}". Estilo moderno, limpio, corporativo.
